title: Huawei makes 1.4nm chip??
summary: Caleb Writes Code discusses Huawei's announcement of Tau Scaling Law as a competitive response in the US-China semiconductor race. The video covers EUV and DUV lithography techniques, packaging innovations, and logic folding as key enablers of advanced chip manufacturing at the 1.4nm scale.
